case_name:
The People,
            Respondent, v. Michael Erber, 
            Appellant.
issue_details: Whether a defendant is required to preserve a challenge to the Attorney Generalâs prosecutorial authority under Executive Law Â§ 63 (3);

Whether the grand jury evidence was legally insufficient to establish grand larceny in the second degree, grand larceny in the third degree, and scheme to defraud in the first degree and whether insufficiency was cured by legally sufficient evidence at trial;

Whether the court erred in admitting the prosecution to introduce evidence that defendant may have made false allegations against one of the complainants.
